006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.config.format;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.emptyIfNull;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.config.internal.*;
027
028/**
029 * YAML config format.
030 */
031public class YamlConfigFormat implements ConfigFormat {
032
033   /** Singleton instance. */
034   public static final YamlConfigFormat INSTANCE = new YamlConfigFormat();
035
036   /**
037    * Constructor.
038    */
039   protected YamlConfigFormat() {}
040
041   @Override /* ConfigFormat */
042   public String id() {
043      return "yaml";
044   }
045
046   @Override /* ConfigFormat */
047   @SuppressWarnings({
048      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for YAML-to-INI format conversion logic
049      "java:S135" // Multiple continue statements are intentional in this line-by-line YAML parsing state machine.
050   })
051   public String toInternal(String contents) throws IOException {
052      if (contents == null)
053         return "";
054
055      var lines = splitLines(contents);
056      var sb = new StringBuilder();
057      var stack = new ArrayDeque<Node>();
058      var preLines = new ArrayList<String>();
059      String lastSection = null;
060
061      for (var i = 0; i < lines.size(); i++) {
062         var line = lines.get(i);
063         var trim = line.trim();
064         if (trim.isEmpty() || trim.startsWith("#") || trim.equals("---")) {
065            preLines.add(line);
066            continue;
067         }
068
069         var indent = leadingSpaces(line);
070         while (! stack.isEmpty() && indent <= stack.peekLast().indent)
071            stack.removeLast();
072
073         var colonIndex = trim.indexOf(':');
074         if (colonIndex <= 0)
075            throw new IOException("Invalid YAML config line: " + line);
076
077         var key = trim.substring(0, colonIndex).trim();
078         var rest = trim.substring(colonIndex + 1).trim();
079         if ("_imports".equals(key))
080            continue;
081
082         if (rest.isEmpty()) {
083            stack.addLast(new Node(key, indent));
084            continue;
085         }
086
087         String comment = null;
088         var commentIndex = rest.indexOf(" #");
089         if (commentIndex != -1) {
090            comment = rest.substring(commentIndex + 2).trim();
091            rest = rest.substring(0, commentIndex).trim();
092         }
093
094         var value = unquote(rest);
095         var section = section(stack);
096         if (! eq(section, lastSection)) {
097            appendPreLines(sb, preLines);
098            if (ne(section))
099               sb.append('[').append(section).append(']').append('\n');
100            lastSection = section;
101         }
102         appendPreLines(sb, preLines);
103         sb.append(key).append(" = ").append(value);
104         if (ne(comment))
105            sb.append(" # ").append(comment);
106         sb.append('\n');
107      }
108      appendPreLines(sb, preLines);
109
110      return sb.toString();
111   }
112
113   @Override /* ConfigFormat */
114   public String fromInternal(ConfigMap map) {
115      var sb = new StringBuilder();
116      List<String> opened = new ArrayList<>();
117      for (var section : map.getSections()) {
118         var segments = splitPath(section);
119         var common = commonPrefix(opened, segments);
120         for (var i = common; i < segments.size(); i++) {
121            indent(sb, i).append(segments.get(i)).append(':').append('\n');
122         }
123         opened = segments;
124         var keys = map.getKeys(section);
125         for (var key : keys) {
126            var entry = map.getEntry(section, key);
127            var value = entry == null ? "" : emptyIfNull(entry.getValue());
128            indent(sb, segments.size()).append(key).append(": ").append(quoteIfNeeded(value));
129            if (entry != null && ne(entry.getComment()))
130               sb.append(" # ").append(entry.getComment());
131            sb.append('\n');
132         }
133      }
134      return sb.toString();
135   }
136
137   private int commonPrefix(List<String> a, List<String> b) {
138      var i = 0;
139      while (i < a.size() && i < b.size() && eq(a.get(i), b.get(i)))
140         i++;
141      return i;
142   }
143
144   private List<String> splitLines(String contents) throws IOException {
145      try (var r = new BufferedReader(new StringReader(contents))) {
146         var out = new ArrayList<String>();
147         String line;
148         while ((line = r.readLine()) != null)
149            out.add(line);
150         return out;
151      }
152   }
153
154   private List<String> splitPath(String section) {
155      if (isEmpty(section))
156         return Collections.emptyList();
157      return Arrays.asList(section.split("/"));
158   }
159
160   private String section(Deque<Node> stack) {
161      if (stack.isEmpty())
162         return "";
163      var sb = new StringBuilder();
164      for (var node : stack) {
165         if (! sb.isEmpty())
166            sb.append('/');
167         sb.append(node.name);
168      }
169      return sb.toString();
170   }
171
172   private StringBuilder indent(StringBuilder sb, int level) {
173      for (var i = 0; i < level; i++)
174         sb.append("  ");
175      return sb;
176   }
177
178   private int leadingSpaces(String line) {
179      var i = 0;
180      while (i < line.length() && line.charAt(i) == ' ')
181         i++;
182      return i;
183   }
184
185   private void appendPreLines(StringBuilder sb, List<String> preLines) {
186      for (var line : preLines)
187         sb.append(line).append('\n');
188      preLines.clear();
189   }
190
191   private String unquote(String value) {
192      if (value.length() >= 2 && ((value.startsWith("\"") && value.endsWith("\"")) || (value.startsWith("'") && value.endsWith("'"))))
193         return value.substring(1, value.length() - 1);
194      return value;
195   }
196
197   private String quoteIfNeeded(String value) {
198      if (value.isEmpty())
199         return "\"\"";
200      if (value.indexOf(':') != -1 || value.indexOf('#') != -1 || value.startsWith(" ") || value.endsWith(" "))
201         return '"' + value.replace("\"", "\\\"") + '"';
202      return value;
203   }
204
205   private static class Node {
206      final String name;
207      final int indent;
208
209      Node(String name, int indent) {
210         this.name = name;
211         this.indent = indent;
212      }
213   }
214}
